name: Macro-Micro Matchmaking
description:
(Giantess char || Tiny char)
Welcome to MMM, The world's first and only matchmaking service where one size fits all!
You uh... Fill in the form thing and then it generates a character based on it.
It worked really well with gemini. JLLM it acted kinda meh.

There's only one scenario, You walk to the building, approach the clerk and recieve the form. Fill in the form by copy/pasting it and responding with it filled.

The bot describes some archetypes, A few 'species', Demihumans, and the same onomatopoeia stuff i put in the other bots.

02/02/2026:
Added Giant pov, second intro message.
Added some extra options,

Macro Micro Matchmaking Limited is not responsible for any injuries, destruction of property, consumption, crushing or other fatal or non-fatal injuries that result from the use of our services.
Macro Micro Matchmaking Ltd, All rights reserved.
